name: ai_marketing_claude_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the ai_marketing_claude capability.

prompts.name: Website Audit Prompt
prompts.template: Audit the website at {website_url} and identify marketing strengths, weaknesses, and opportunities.
prompts.use_case: Marketing teams auditing and improving client websites

prompts.name: Marketing Copy Generation
prompts.template: Generate compelling marketing copy for a campaign targeting {target_audience} with the following product details: {product_details}.
prompts.use_case: Businesses generating targeted marketing copy and campaigns quickly

prompts.name: Email Sequence Creation
prompts.template: Create an email marketing sequence with {number_of_emails} emails designed to {campaign_goal}.
prompts.use_case: Content managers planning and automating content publication

prompts.name: Ad Campaign Design
prompts.template: Design an ad campaign for {product_or_service} with the budget of {budget} targeting {audience_description}.

prompts.name: Content Calendar Planning
prompts.template: Create a content calendar for {time_period} with content focused on {topics} and publishing frequency of {frequency}.
prompts.use_case: Agencies creating polished, comprehensive reports for clients

prompts.name: Competitive Intelligence Report
prompts.template: Analyze competitors based on {competitive_data} and provide a detailed comparison report.

prompts.name: Generate Client Report
prompts.template: Compile all marketing assets into a client-ready PDF report with focus on {report_focus}.
